name: launch_chipscope_analyzer
short_description: Issues an error that you can not run this command
full_help:
launch_chipscope_analyzer

Description: 
Issues an error that you can not run this command

Syntax: 
launch_chipscope_analyzer  [-run <arg>] [-csproject <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-run]        Implemented run to launch ChipScope Analyzer with
  [-csproject]  ChipScope project
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
ToolLaunch
